diagrams.title: Partial Derivative as Plane Slice
diagrams.description: Shows how ∂f/∂x represents slope of surface z=f(x,y) cut by plane y=constant
diagrams.purpose: Visualize partial derivative as slope in one direction only

diagrams.title: Gradient Vector Field
diagrams.description: Gradient arrows pointing uphill on a contour map showing direction of steepest ascent
diagrams.purpose: Understand gradient as direction of steepest increase

diagrams.title: Critical Point Classification
diagrams.description: Three surfaces showing: local maximum (peak), local minimum (valley), saddle point
elements: Horizontal tangent planes at each critical point
diagrams.purpose: Visualize types of stationary points using Hessian test

diagrams.title: Chain Rule Dependency
diagrams.description: Dependency diagram showing z depends on x,y which depend on t
diagrams.purpose: Remember chain rule for dependent variables

diagrams.title: Total Differential Geometry
diagrams.description: Tangent plane approximation showing df as change in height
diagrams.purpose: Visualize total differential as best linear approximation

visuals.title: Differentiation And Partial Differentials
visuals.description: Visual diagram for differentiation and partial differentials
